title: MergeProposal
description:
Result of a merge proposal (push branch + create PR).

Returned by `merge_propose()` in `assay-core`. When `dry_run` is true,
`pr_url` and `pr_number` are `None` and no side effects occur.

dry_run.description: Whether this was a dry run (no side effects).

gate_summary.description: Formatted gate evidence used as the PR body.

pr_number.description: Number of the created pull request (absent in dry-run mode).

pr_url.description: URL of the created pull request (absent in dry-run mode).
